title: Infestation Potion Mod
description: This mod adds a new Infestation Potion that causes mobs to spawn 1-3 silverfish when hit, with a 10% chance per hit. The effect lasts 3 minutes.
body:
The Infestation Potion Mod introduces a new custom potion that, when applied to a mob, causes periodic silverfish spawns around the affected mob. This effect lasts for 3 minutes and has a 10% chance per hit to trigger the infestation, spawning 1-3 silverfish around the infected mob.

⚠️ Brewing Bug Warning:
Due to a current issue with the brewing mechanics, the potion continues to brew even after completion if additional ingredients are present in the brewing stand. To avoid this, only use one ingredient per brewing session or remove the completed potion quickly before it attempts to brew again.

🔹 Features:

Adds a new potion effect that spawns silverfish when the afflicted entity is hit.
Works with Splash and Lingering Potions for area-based infestations.
Compatible with Fabric Loader 1.20.x.

🔹 How to Obtain:

Brew the Infestation Potion by combining Awkward Potion with Stone in a Brewing Stand.
Upgrade to Splash and Lingering versions using Gunpowder and Dragon’s Breath.
